title: Tool
description: the declaration of a typed deterministic operation that a Step may invoke — name + kind + inputs schema reference + outputs schema reference + error catalogue + implementation_kind (the transport binding) + implementation_detail (kind-specific shape). The CONTRACT for one operation, independent of the workflow or step that calls it. Reuse: many Steps across many Workflows reference the same Tool. Belongs to a Tenant (each business's tool catalogue is tenant-scoped). When implementation_kind is `workflow_dispatch`, the Tool's invocation fires another Workflow (same-repo or cross-repo) — the composition primitive for multi-Workflow orchestration.

name.description: the operationId such as gh-pr-create, sanctions-screen, stripe-charge

kind.description: OpenAPI-style classification — query is read-only, mutation is local state change, side-effect is external effect, hybrid is both

inputs_schema_ref.description: URI or path to a JSON Schema 2020-12 document defining the operation input payload

outputs_schema_ref.description: URI or path to a JSON Schema 2020-12 document defining the operation output payload

implementation_detail.description: a JSON-encoded kind-specific object — for mcp_server has server_id and tool_name; for subprocess has command, args, env_keys; for python_import has module and function; for http_call has endpoint, method, auth_kind; for claude_code_tool has tool_name; for skill_invocation has plugin and skill_name; for workflow_dispatch has target_workflow_ref required as the Workflow to invoke, target_project_ref optional Project scope, target_repo optional owner-slash-name for cross-repo dispatch via gh repository_dispatch or gh workflow run, wait_for_completion bool to block until target Workflow terminates, inputs_ref text content-addressed reference to inputs payload mirroring LifecycleRun.inputs_ref convention from v2.1.0

version.description: semver — the Tool implementation version, independent of schema_version which is the entity-schema version
